title: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Super Soft Plush Bear with Rattle in Tummy and Striped Cotton Bow (Small, Blue)
features: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Blue Small bear rattle
Supersoft plush bear wearing a striped cotton bow
description: From the manufacturer We are an innovative British Company which specialises in Gifts for everyone. About us Based in the UK, with a friendly field sales team, all of our products are designed in-house by our Product Development Team. Within our product collection we have a funky range of Girls Night Out and Best Friends wine glasses, mugs and money banks. Our Celebration Time is a collection of Age Wine Glasses with glitter accents and diamanté embellishments, accompanied by matching boxed Mugs – the perfect birthday gift. Our Baby range is simply gorgeous and includes money banks, super soft Teddy Bears, blankies, booties and rattles. We also offer plush collections with our Bears from the Past, a delightful concept of Traditional Teddy Bears and Li’l Peepers ranges. This is just a taster, we have more exciting product collections to offer
